summary: Lemma 1 (DPI domination, unconditional) and Lemma 2 (per-row maximal-invariant profile-MLE = sorted neg-Euclidean + Hungarian) verified; shared-P scope Remark correct (Gram YY^T genuinely shared-P invariant, per-row sort not joint maximal invariant); 2logn cited as external DCK benchmark. No FATAL/CRITICAL. Four conditional wording fixes applied: profile-MLE/joint-MAP (not marginal-MAP) labeling, ties non-uniqueness, Q-injectivity sufficient-not-necessary, threshold scoping.
